This family includes a wide variety of plants, many of which are epiphytes or terrestrial plants native to the tropical regions of the Americas. Within the Bromeliaceae family, Nicolsonia juruenensis is a part of the subfamily Tillandsioideae, which is a large group of bromeliads characterized by their tank-like leaves. The genus Nicolsonia is also a part of this subfamily, and it is known to include only a few species of bromeliads. Nicolsonia juruenensis is native to the tropical regions of Brazil, specifically in the state of Pará.
